<!--
This template is the PR structure, both here and for the agent that drafts PRs.
The gate checks that the required sections below are present and non-empty and
that the title follows Conventional Commits. It never judges what you wrote,
only that you wrote it. Keep the headings; replace the guidance under each.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What changed and why, in a few sentences. Lead with the behaviour change a
reviewer will see, not the file list. Required. -->

## Verification

<!-- How you know it works: the tests you ran, the commands, the manual checks.
"Trust me" is not verification. Required. -->

## Divergence

<!-- Where this PR departs from the linked issue's plan, and why. Leave the
guidance in place if there is nothing to report; the gate does not require this
section yet. -->
